missingEdge: The packet-posture bootstrap is implemented, but current invocation cannot reach CF-076 through CF-084 because consumer scripts still require two phase-governance artifacts at former live paths after those artifacts were intentionally moved into archive.

citations.evidenceRole: reviewer-accepted current-run blocker and authority reconciliation
evidence that both source artifacts were moved intentionally

impact: Closed: the repaired bootstrap passed once and the retained UC-02 runner recorded nine of nine scenario PASS results. The semantic registry-to-checker edge is operationally PROVEN bounded.

closeCondition.conditionText: A governed repair reconciles the archive authority with all current consumers and the retained UC-02 proof runner then records bootstrap PASS and nine of nine scenario PASS results.

reopenCondition.conditionText: Reopen if a later packet-posture bootstrap or release evidence consumer again resolves an archived phase-governance artifact through a nonexistent live path.
